record.field: records.write({'quote_id': '', 'contract_document_uploaded': False, 'other_files_uploaded': False, 'is_data_upload_completed': False}) room_measurements = records.room_measurement_line.filtered(lambda x: x.improveit_id) if room_measurements: room_measurements.write({'improveit_id': ''}) records.add_quote_sales_app(record.appointment_result)

records.write({'is_data_upload_completed': False}) room_measurements = records.room_measurement_line.filtered(lambda x: not x.exclude_from_calculation and x.improveit_id) if room_measurements: room_measurements.write({'improveit_id': ''}) records.add_quote_items_sales_app() records.write({'is_data_upload_completed': True})

records.write({'quote_id': '', 'contract_document_uploaded': False, 'other_files_uploaded': False, 'is_data_upload_completed': False}) room_measurements = records.room_measurement_line.filtered(lambda x: not x.exclude_from_calculation and x.improveit_id) if room_measurements: room_measurements.write({'improveit_id': ''}) records.add_sale_api()

records.write({'is_data_upload_completed': False}) room_measurements = records.room_measurement_line.filtered(lambda x: not x.exclude_from_calculation and x.improveit_id) if room_measurements: room_measurements.write({'improveit_id': ''}) records.add_sale_items_api() records.write({'is_data_upload_completed': True})

record.contract_doc_attachment_id.write({'improveit_id': ''}) model_id = model.env['ir.model'].search([('model', '=', 'sale.order')], limit=1) sale_order = record if sale_order.appointment_result == 'Sold': contract_doc_attachment = sale_order.contract_doc_attachment_id or False if not contract_doc_attachment: sign_request = model.env['otl_document_sign.request'].sudo().search( [('model_id', '=', model_id.id), ('res_id', '=', sale_order.id)], order='create_date desc', limit=1) if sign_request: if sign_request.state == 'signed': if not sign_request.completed_document: sign_request.generate_completed_document() contract_doc_attachment = sign_request.document_image() sale_order.write( {'contract_doc_attachment_id': contract_doc_attachment.id, 'document_signed': True}) sale_order.add_contract_document_file()

for order in records: appointment = order.appointment_id response_result = order.set_appointment_result_api(order.appointment_result, notes={"what_happened_notes": appointment.what_happened_notes or "", "whats_next_notes": appointment.whats_next_notes or ""}) log(str(response_result))

record.action_create_credit_application({ "co_applicant_present_employers_state":"", "address_relationship_city":"", "co_applicant_date_of_birth":"", "co_applicant_previous_employers_city":"", "co_applicant_previous_street2":"", "co_applicant_signature_date":"01/24/2023", "date_aquired":"", "hunterMessageStatus":"Yes", "occupation_previous_employer":"", "home_phone":"(636) 675-1783",
